wish: We wish you Happy Holidays and a very profitable year in 2018!
ceo: IQ Option Holding Founder and CEO
text-1: We, as IQ Option, are committed to serving you even better in the upcoming year. It’s a privilege to build an amazing software and a service (albite not without some "bugs" and problems:) that you find valuable for your investment and trading.
text-2: In the coming year we are going to
text-2-strong: update our line of products with a particular focus on Crypto.
text-3-1: First and foremost, we’re due to release a simple app that would allow you
text-3-strong: to purchase, store, send, receive and of course — to sell back top cryptocurrencies
text-3-2: (remember: you did not make any money until you sold your position!).
text-4-2: The real marketplace for cryptocurrencies with the best possible service, so you can measure the depth of the market, analyze the structure of the current supply and demand, and off course build your order-strategy.
text-5: Mobile chats with traders, support and VIP managers, Stock trading and ETFs, faster execution and smaller commissions — all of that will be made available to you.  The whole team of IQ Option is going to rock all year long
text-5-strong: to make sure you’re enjoying our service as much as we enjoy serving you!
